title: Billable package: DB3 pick jumps to customer folder
description:
After you pick a DB3 in the billable package wizard, PipeShare immediately opens the customer destination step so you can choose where the package should live (e.g. AJJ).

Also keeps the full-subtree scan so videos/PDFs auto-detect without clicking through folders first.

Who is affected: PipeShare billable package on BASE (and SaaS after Push).
changeLog: Selecting a DB3 advances straight to the customer save-location step.
Skip DB3 still uses Next to reach the destination picker.
Billable wizard still scans the full package subtree for auto-detect.
